author: y4rr
content: Surfaced by Phase 2 audit-fix on #1064. New fixture adjusted_mutual_info_score_mixed (labels_true=[0,0,1,1,2,2], labels_pred=[0,0,0,1,1,1]) records sklearn AMI=0.298792458, but ferrotorch-ml::metrics::adjusted_mutual_info_score (which delegates to ferrolearn_metrics::adjusted_mutual_info) returns 0.225042283. Diff 7.4e-2, way above 1e-9 tolerance. The original perfect-fixture test only checked identical inputs and missed this. Implementation lives in the ferrolearn-metrics crate (separate workspace). Out of Phase 2 scope (no ferrotorch-ml/src/ changes per coordination boundaries). Likely cause: AMI baseline correction E[MI] term computed differently from sklearn's combinatorial expectation formula.
